opportunities.specific_product: stackable clear pantry bins with labels set
opportunities.transformation_hook: I turned my disaster pantry into a Pinterest board for $38 in one afternoon
opportunities.before_state: Overstuffed pantry with falling boxes, expired food hidden in back, no visibility, shame every time the door opens
opportunities.after_state: Color-coded clear bins, everything visible at a glance, labels on every shelf, looks like a professional organizer did it
opportunities.why_now: April is peak spring cleaning season — pantry organization searches spike every year in mid-April and this is the #1 action-taker purchase under $50.

opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: This $47 cover hid 3 years of pet hair and scratches in under 10 minutes
opportunities.before_state: Stained, scratched, pet-hair-covered sofa that guests notice immediately — embarrassing to have people over
opportunities.after_state: Clean, fitted, modern-looking couch that looks brand new — no one believes it's the same piece of furniture
opportunities.why_now: Spring shedding season peaks in April — pet owners are desperately searching for solutions as fur accumulates, and Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission makes this the highest-revenue single unit in the portfolio.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia kitchen utensil set + bamboo drawer organizer
opportunities.transformation_hook: My kitchen drawer went from a junk nightmare to a chef's setup for $52
opportunities.before_state: Tangled utensils crammed into one drawer, duplicates everywhere, can never find anything, cooking feels chaotic
opportunities.after_state: Every tool has a slot, matching Syruvia utensils look professional, cooking feels calm and intentional
opportunities.why_now: Spring kitchen refreshes drive a measurable search spike every April; bundling Syruvia tools (20% commission) with an organizer doubles cart value in a single Reel CTA.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products 4-piece outdoor sectional set
opportunities.transformation_hook: We went from a bare concrete patio to a full outdoor living room for $299
opportunities.before_state: Empty or cluttered patio with mismatched old chairs, no cohesion, never actually used as a space to relax
opportunities.after_state: Coordinated sectional with cushions, throw pillows, usable entertaining space that looks like a resort patio
opportunities.why_now: Late April triggers outdoor living purchases as temperatures rise — Best Choice Products' 15% commission on a $299 ticket item yields strong absolute dollar earnings per conversion.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm adjustable side sleeper pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: I stopped waking up with neck pain for $89 — I wish I'd done this 5 years ago
opportunities.before_state: Waking up stiff every morning, flat pillow that goes lumpy, tossing and turning, neck and shoulder ache by 7am
opportunities.after_state: Proper cervical support for side sleeping, waking up rested with zero neck pain, adjustable fill means it's perfectly customized
opportunities.why_now: Neck pain is a year-round high-intent search but spring bedroom refreshes lift pillow purchases in April; Eli & Elm's 20% commission on an $89 AOV makes each conversion worth significantly more than generic pillow brands.
